name: @pai/llm-registry
description: Honest LLM diagnosis + persona inheritance for PAI agents — US + Chinese ecosystems

scripts.test: node --input-type=module -e "const {LLM_REGISTRY} = await import('./dist/registry.js'); const ok = Object.keys(LLM_REGISTRY).length === 10; console.log(ok ? 'PASS: 10 LLMs' : 'FAIL'); process.exit(ok ? 0 : 1)"

author: Mohamed Abdelaziz <mohamed@pai.build>
